plan_review_notes: Reviewed the expanded task-specific plan. The authority-boundary task now has explicit acceptance criteria, hard risks, safety invariants, out-of-scope limits, evidence requirements, and failure/recovery notes. Approving for spec freeze.

plan_review_history.notes: Expanded BRIEF and PLAN from template text into a task-specific spec. Added concrete acceptance criteria plus hard risks, safety invariants, out-of-scope limits, evidence requirements, and failure/recovery notes so the authority-boundary task can be reviewed against explicit safety rules.

Reviewed the expanded task-specific plan. The authority-boundary task now has explicit acceptance criteria, hard risks, safety invariants, out-of-scope limits, evidence requirements, and failure/recovery notes. Approving for spec freeze.

spec_review_notes: Freeze the authority-boundary task with explicit soft-cognition vs hard-state ownership, evaluation-only harness rules, no self-approval, and append-only run-artifact boundaries.

normal_cases.name: The docs present one consistent authority model for `evolution`, the harness executor, and Sisyphus.

edge_cases.name: Read-only orchestration is defined precisely enough to allow append-only run artifacts without permitting live-state mutation.

exception_cases.name: No sentence in the docs allows evolution to approve, freeze, or promote its own follow-up work.
